raw_text:

The user says:

"packet_id=HVSMW2-EADF3B3DC5465BFAA006

repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-340C89E1
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

Return the three-line status record."

We need to output a plain text record with three key=value lines: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. We must not add headings, explanations, JSON, Markdown, or extra lines. Begin with route_verdict=.

Thus we produce:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-340C89E1
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

We must ensure no extra whitespace lines. Just exactly three lines.

Also perhaps include packet_id? The user said "Return the three-line status record." They gave status values: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. So we only output those three.

Thus final answer:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-340C89E1
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

Make sure no trailing spaces. Provide exactly those lines.
</think>

blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
